name: WELL Substrate Vitality
description: Human substrate governance layer for the arifOS federation. Monitors operator biological state, cognitive pressure, and readiness under constitutional floors F1-F13. Exposes unified substrate packet (human + machine + MCP coupled verdict) for federation-wide substrate assessment.

skills.name: Classify Substrate
skills.description: Chemistry-level substrate classification — sense and classify the raw biological and machine substrate.

skills.name: Trace Lineage
skills.description: Biology-level lineage tracing — recall memory and audit history across substrate events.

skills.name: Detect Boundary
skills.description: Boundary detection — identify thresholds, limits, and edge conditions in substrate readiness.

skills.name: Measure Gradient
skills.description: Energy gradient measurement — assess deltas, pressures, and directional changes in substrate state.

skills.name: Assess Metabolism
skills.description: Metabolism assessment — evaluate how substrate resources are being consumed and transformed.

skills.name: Assess Homeostasis
skills.description: Homeostasis check — evaluate regulatory balance across biological and machine systems.

skills.name: Check Repair
skills.description: Repair and resilience check — assess recovery capacity and repair mechanisms.

skills.name: Validate Vitality
skills.description: Vitality validation — judge whether substrate vitality meets thresholds for safe operation.

skills.name: Assess Livelihood
skills.description: Livelihood assessment — evaluate long-term sustainability and thriving capacity.

skills.name: Assess Reliability
skills.description: Reliability assessment — measure machine and infrastructure reliability metrics.

skills.name: Guard Dignity
skills.description: Dignity guard — ensure human dignity and meaning are preserved in substrate assessments.

skills.name: Anchor Evidence
skills.description: Evidence anchoring — immutably record substrate state to VAULT999 for audit and constitutional review.

metadata.deprecation_notice: Ω-WELL v2 canonical surface active. Legacy tools are deprecated aliases retained for compatibility.
